{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Prophecy of the Rising Sun
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The prophecy of the Rising Sun predicts the end of the reign of the [[Crimson Vault]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“The prophecy of the Rising Sun has already borne fruit. The reign of the Crimson Vault has almost come to an end.”<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
